name: Greg "Craola" Simkins
description: Greg Simkins — Craola — began as a graffiti writer in Los Angeles before evolving into one of the defining painters of the Lowbrow / Pop Surrealism movement. His large-scale oils blend childhood nostalgia and candy-colored fantasy with dark undertones — rabbits clutching grenades, dreamscapes teetering between wonder and dread. Meticulous detail and a cartoonist's sensibility run through every canvas.
